name: task_remove_context
description: Remove a context source from a task by its index. The context entry at the specified position is deleted and subsequent entries shift down. Use task_get to inspect the current context_sources array and determine the correct index before removing.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task containing the context to remove

context_index.description: Zero-based index of the context source to remove from the task's context_sources array
